query:
SELECT ticker, transactionType, shares, totalAmountCHF 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE portfolioId = 1320001 
ORDER BY ticker;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT ticker, transactionType, shares, totalAmountCHF 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE portfolioId = 1320001 
ORDER BY ticker;
